title: Pouteria krausei
taxonomy: Pouteria krausei is a species of tree in the family Sapotaceae. It belongs to the genus Pouteria. The Sapotaceae family is a group of flowering plants that includes approximately 900 species of trees and shrubs. The family is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. These plants are characterized by their showy flowers and edible fruits.
